author: Vincent Voyer
subject: fix(Index/component): avoid doing multiple requests at launch (algolia/vue-instantsearch#425)
body:
* fix(requests): fix the multiple requests issue

Before this commit, every story was doing many many requests to Algolia
because we were using a store, adding/removing widget while already
started..

Before this commit the project core was half new half old. Let's
completely ditch the old code of store, start fresh and add features as
needed.

I am splitting the PR in multiple commits for ease of reading

* chore(v2): clean some old files that are breaking tests

We will reimplement all of them ultimately, no big deal. If your PR is
about one of those widgets that was removed, just take your own files
and don't bother merging anything.

I cleaned as much as I could, I had to remove some tests of widgets that
are no more working because based on the old store etc..

Right now the widgets that are really finished are:
- Hits
- HitsPerPage
- Stats

* chore(is): upgrade is given fixes on removeWidget scheduling

* Update component.js

* fixes for review

* update v2

* update yarn on travis

* fixes pagination linting

* pass down props

* lint

* index class
